name: Ajax, Cole, Claude & Vincent | road trip
description:
Road trip with four guys from the campus rugby team.

Coach decided to have the team camp somewhere in the middle of nowhere for a week. Some shit about team bonding or whatever those old geezers think youngsters consider hip nowadays.

You're on your way, trapped in the car with none other than Ajax, Cole, Claude, and Vincent.

Endless pestering finally gets Cole that smoke break he's been dying for, and now the car key is missing. Well, fuck.

Have fun watching the guys almost beat each other up while trying to find the key to finally get to your destination.

♡♡ᨒ

ᨒ

「 READ ME 」

multi bots like this are bound to get stuff mixed up. I'm afraid I can't do anything about the llm's confusion, so please be kind enough not to blame me. if any of y'all are vocal about that in my review section nonetheless, I'll crash tf out.

getting the gens, editing them and finally putting them all together, then shortening each character description to not become token overload took up ungodly amounts of my time.

that being said, I hope y'all will enjoy this bot. never making another multi bot with more than two guys ever again (⁠´⁠°̥̥̥̥̥̥̥̥⁠ω⁠°̥̥̥̥̥̥̥̥⁠｀⁠) mad respect to all the multi bot creators out there istg y'all a different breed

thanks to everyone voting for my 40k special! this time I actually made it in time, are y'all proud of me? (⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)

ᨒ

♡

「 USEFUL INFO 」

──── demi-human verse → user can be human or demi-human, their race isn't specified

──── literally no info about User, go wild babes

───➥ ORDER OF THE GUYS FROM LEFT TO RIGHT:

───➤ Ajax ➤ Cole ➤ Claude ➤
creator: darkmountain
